name: Portal IQ
excerpt: Portal IQ is an automated HubSpot audit platform. It scans a HubSpot portal across Marketing, Sales, and Service, then returns a prioritized, customized set of recommendations. HubSpot App Marketplace certified.
content:
Portal IQ is an automated HubSpot audit platform. It scans a HubSpot portal across the Marketing, Sales, and Service hubs and the CRM, identifies issues and opportunities, and delivers a prioritized, customized report of actionable recommendations. The app is certified in the HubSpot App Marketplace, and certified HubSpot partners can order fully partner-branded audits for their own clients.

Key benefits of the offering:

  • Automated portal scan: A fast, repeatable read of how a HubSpot portal is set up across Marketing, Sales, and Service, without manual review.
  • Prioritized recommendations: Findings come ranked and actionable, so teams fix what moves HubSpot ROI first instead of working from a flat list.
  • Partner-branded audits: Certified HubSpot partners can deliver the audit under their own brand for a one-time investment, as a productized client offering.
  • HubSpot App Marketplace certified: The app passed HubSpot's technical review, so the data and recommendations sit on a vetted integration.

Why partner together?

Portal IQ instruments whether a HubSpot portal is set up to perform. Content Cucumber instruments whether buyers and AI engines find, trust, and cite the brand in the first place. The two reads do not overlap, and a client needs both. Together they form one combined offering. Portal IQ delivers the portal-health and configuration read, Content Cucumber delivers the content, schema, and AI-citation discoverability read, and the client gets a single picture of whether HubSpot is working and whether the content around it is discoverable. Content Cucumber already resells Portal IQ partner-branded audits as a HubSpot Solutions Partner. Co-sell is the lead shape, with reciprocal referral as the low-friction default.
